summary: Tested cross-pillar journey features: Pricing sync, Pawmeter batch update, and Mira AI enhancements. All 14 backend tests passed. Pricing sync successfully synced 3171 products to services and 58 services to products. Pawmeter batch update updated 2145 products and 2406 services.

minor.issue: Pawmeter field not included in adapted response when querying unified_products. Data is stored correctly in DB but not passed through in API response.

action_items: Consider adding 'pawmeter' field to the adapted response in GET /api/products endpoint (line 5838-5855 in server.py) to expose pawmeter scores to frontend
critical_code_review_comments: Pawmeter data is correctly stored in unified_products collection but the /api/products endpoint adapts the response and doesn't include the pawmeter field. Services endpoint correctly returns pawmeter.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cross-pillar journey features verified working. Pricing sync syncs 3171 products to services and 58 services to products. Pawmeter batch update updates 2145 products and 2406 services. Mira AI correctly implements concierge philosophy ('No is never an answer') and provides cross-pillar suggestions.

pricing_full_sync.details: Synced 3171 products to services, 58 services to products. Requires admin auth.

pawmeter_batch_update.details: Updated 2145 products and 2406 services with pawmeter scores (comfort, safety, quality, value, joy). Requires admin auth.

products_pawmeter_field.details: Pawmeter field correctly stored in unified_products collection with all 5 criteria (comfort, safety, quality, value, joy) plus overall score. Note: Not exposed in /api/products response.

services_pawmeter_field.details: Services correctly return pawmeter field with all criteria via GET /api/services endpoint.

mira_cross_pillar_suggestions.details: When asking about birthday, Mira suggests cake, treats, and related products. Cross-pillar mapping implemented in system prompt (sections 24-26).

mira_concierge_philosophy.details: Mira correctly implements 'No is never an answer' philosophy. When asked for unavailable items (kangaroo treats, wheelchair), Mira offers to source them and suggests alternatives instead of saying 'we don't have'.
